segments.text: All right, ladies and gentlemen, good evening and welcome back to Torah Studies.

And thus will begin a time period known as the nine days.
And what are the nine days?
They're the nine days between the first of Av and the ninth of Av.

It's the same day by, you know, certainly divine orchestration
that the second temple was destroyed by the Romans.

to wander for 40 years in the desert.
